message:
refactor(abi): switch fchmodat2/eventfd2/rt_sig* to raw syscall + runtime_policy gates

Follow-on to c269d064 + 0c61ad9d. The six ABI shims for the bd-dea1g
batch initially landed as thin libc::syscall + raw_syscall_with_errno
forwards. That works but it (a) routes through the host libc symbol
we are intending to replace, and (b) skips the runtime_policy
membrane the rest of the unistd_abi surface uses to enforce
hardened/strict-mode deny gates. Bring the six shims into line with
the rest of the file.

Per-shim changes:

fchmodat2(dirfd, pathname, mode, flags)
  - runtime_policy::decide(ApiFamily::IoFd, ...) gate; Deny returns
    -1/EPERM and observe(... fail=true).
  - NULL pathname guard returns -1/EFAULT before the syscall.
  - Forward through syscall::sys_fchmodat2 (raw syscall added in
    the previous commit) instead of libc::syscall.
  - runtime_policy::observe with cost=10 on the success path.

eventfd2(initval, flags)
  - Forward through syscall::sys_eventfd2 (already in the core
    crate from a prior batch). No runtime_policy gate — eventfd2
    is the raw fd-allocation primitive, not an IoFd-class operation
    in our taxonomy, matching how plain eventfd was set up.

rt_sigprocmask(how, set, oldset, sigsetsize)
  - Forward through syscall::sys_rt_sigprocmask. Raw pointer arity
    matches the kernel ABI (set/oldset are *const u8/*mut u8 in
    syscall::, *const c_void/*mut c_void at the libc surface — the
    cast is a single `as *const u8` per pointer).

rt_sigqueueinfo(tgid, sig, *uinfo)
  - Forward through syscall::sys_rt_sigqueueinfo with uinfo cast to
    *const u8.

rt_sigsuspend(*mask, sigsetsize)
  - Forward through syscall::sys_rt_sigsuspend. Note: this call
    intentionally does NOT use match { Ok => 0, Err => -1 } the
    same way the others do, because rt_sigsuspend never returns
    success — it always returns -1 with errno = EINTR after a
    handled signal. The shim therefore unconditionally writes errno
    from the Result and returns -1.

rt_tgsigqueueinfo(tgid, tid, sig, *uinfo)
  - Forward through syscall::sys_rt_tgsigqueueinfo with uinfo cast
    to *const u8.

Pure refactor; same observable behavior modulo the new
runtime_policy gate on fchmodat2 (which is identical to how
fchmodat itself is gated).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
